title: GMS Week 01 - NEW YEAR, W.T. FEARS!
section_path: GMS Week 01 - NEW YEAR, W.T. FEARS!
section_path_text: GMS Week 01 - NEW YEAR, W.T. FEARS!
summary:
Main
in Weekly Demolition Reports 05/01/2026
Image reference: 2026-01-05_gms-week-01-new-year-w-t-fears_img1.jpg
After what only seemed like a calm period while Donald Trump was flailing in the polls amid ongoing scandals andinvestigations, he ramped it up and brought 2026 in with a literal BANG via his latest incursion into - and seizure of - President Nicolas Maduro and his wife from their Presidential Home in Venezuela, in a pre-dawn raid by special-forces. Trump even posted a Polaroid of the handcuffed Maduro, blindfolded, as they landed at a secure / undisclosed facility. While Trump's true intentions remain unclear (just yet), it's only a matter of time before we see how global / oil / shipping markets react in the coming week(s) to this globally dictatorial move that has most certainly violated a long list of international laws pertaining to sitting presidents and prisoners of war.
